scope: Deterministic auto/fixed palette quantization, membership, alpha policy and bounded color count.

evidence.alphaPolicy: alpha < 128 is ignored by training/application and every alpha byte plus low-alpha RGB remains unchanged

rejected: Palette cardinality drift: auto output has at most the requested two opaque colors and fixed output belongs only to the declared palette.
Non-deterministic training: repeated real Worker runs match pixels and operation metadata byte-for-byte without Math.random.
Alpha corruption: low-alpha RGB/alpha and fully transparent RGB remain untouched while opaque pixels quantize.
Fixed palette order drift: red and blue source colors resolve to the declared fixed entries with deterministic tie policy.
Unbounded training: exact colors, weighted histogram and k-means iterations are capped by algorithm limits.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: Palette extraction/presets/control UI remains G5-03; stress/performance remains G5-04; process/results/export remains G6/G7.
